# Thailand Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Thailand's complete 4-level administrative hierarchy:
> 77 provinces, 928 districts, 7,364 subdistricts, 79,818 villages.
> Bilingual (Thai + English). CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total provinces: 77
- Total districts: 928
- Total subdistricts: 7,364
- Total villages: 79,818
- Zip codes: included (subdistrict level)
- Coordinates: included (all levels, WGS84)
- Last updated: 2026-05-12
- License: CC-BY-4.0
- Source: ThaiAddress.org

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All provinces (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-provinces.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-districts.json)
- [All subdistricts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-subdistricts.json)
- [All villages (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-villages.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON streaming)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Province

- [กรุงเทพมหานคร (Bangkok)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bangkok/) — 50 districts, 154 subdistricts
- [สมุทรปราการ (Samut Prakan)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/samut-prakan/) — 6 districts, 50 subdistricts
- [นนทบุรี (Nonthaburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nonthaburi/) — 6 districts, 52 subdistricts
- [ปทุมธานี (Pathum Thani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/pathum-thani/) — 7 districts, 60 subdistricts
- [พระนครศรีอยุธยา (Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phra-nakhon-si-ayutthaya/) — 16 districts, 207 subdistricts
- [อ่างทอง (Ang Thong)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ang-thong/) — 7 districts, 73 subdistricts
- [ลพบุรี (Loburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/loburi/) — 11 districts, 121 subdistricts
- [สิงห์บุรี (Sing Buri)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sing-buri/) — 6 districts, 43 subdistricts
- [ชัยนาท (Chai Nat)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chai-nat/) — 8 districts, 53 subdistricts

- [ปราจีนบุรี (Prachin Buri)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/prachin-buri/) — 7 districts, 64 subdistricts

- [สระแก้ว (Sa Kaeo)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sa-kaeo/) — 9 districts, 59 subdistricts
- [นครราชสีมา (Nakhon Ratchasima)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nakhon-ratchasima/) — 32 districts, 285 subdistricts
- [บุรีรัมย์ (Buri Ram)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/buri-ram/) — 23 districts, 189 subdistricts
- [สุรินทร์ (Surin)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/surin/) — 17 districts, 159 subdistricts
- [ศรีสะเกษ (Si Sa Ket)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/si-sa-ket/) — 22 districts, 204 subdistricts

- [สมุทรสงคราม (Samut Songkhram)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/samut-songkhram/) — 3 districts, 36 subdistricts
- [เพชรบุรี (Phetchaburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phetchaburi/) — 8 districts, 92 subdistricts

- [นครศรีธรรมราช (Nakhon Si Thammarat)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nakhon-si-thammarat/) — 23 districts, 169 subdistricts
- [กระบี่ (Krabi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/krabi/) — 8 districts, 52 subdistricts
- [พังงา (Phangnga)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phangnga/) — 8 districts, 48 subdistricts
- [ภูเก็ต (Phuket)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phuket/) — 3 districts, 16 subdistricts
- [สุราษฎร์ธานี (Surat Thani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/surat-thani/) — 19 districts, 130 subdistricts
- [ระนอง (Ranong)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ranong/) — 5 districts, 30 subdistricts
- [ชุมพร (Chumphon)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chumphon/) — 8 districts, 70 subdistricts
- [สงขลา (Songkhla)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/songkhla/) — 16 districts, 127 subdistricts
- [สตูล (Satun)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/satun/) — 7 districts, 36 subdistricts
- [ตรัง (Trang)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/trang/) — 10 districts, 90 subdistricts
- [พัทลุง (Phatthalung)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phatthalung/) — 11 districts, 65 subdistricts
- [ปัตตานี (Pattani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/pattani/) — 12 districts, 115 subdistricts
- [ยะลา (Yala)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/yala/) — 8 districts, 58 subdistricts
- [นราธิวาส (Narathiwat)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/narathiwat/) — 13 districts, 77 subdistricts

## Per-Province Full Data

- [Bangkok](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/bangkok.txt) — 50 districts
- [Samut Prakan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/samut-prakan.txt) — 6 districts
- [Nonthaburi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nonthaburi.txt) — 6 districts
- [Pathum Thani](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/pathum-thani.txt) — 7 districts

- [Kanchanaburi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/kanchanaburi.txt) — 13 districts
- [Suphan Buri](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/suphan-buri.txt) — 10 districts
- [Nakhon Pathom](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-pathom.txt) — 7 districts
- [Samut Sakhon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/samut-sakhon.txt) — 3 districts
- [Samut Songkhram](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/samut-songkhram.txt) — 3 districts
- [Phetchaburi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/phetchaburi.txt) — 8 districts

- [Nakhon Si Thammarat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-si-thammarat.txt) — 23 districts
- [Krabi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/krabi.txt) — 8 districts
- [Phangnga](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/phangnga.txt) — 8 districts
- [Phuket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/phuket.txt) — 3 districts
- [Surat Thani](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/surat-thani.txt) — 19 districts

- [Trang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/trang.txt) — 10 districts
- [Phatthalung](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/phatthalung.txt) — 11 districts
- [Pattani](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/pattani.txt) — 12 districts
- [Yala](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/yala.txt) — 8 districts
- [Narathiwat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/narathiwat.txt) — 13 districts

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique DOPA identifier
- level: 1 (province), 2 (district), 3 (subdistrict), 4 (village)
- name: Thai and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes (DOPA, ISO if applicable)
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of immediate children
- zip_codes: Postal/zip codes (subdistrict level, array — may have multiple)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)
- metadata: Special flags (Bangkok, region)
- source: Original ThaiAddress.org URL

## Citation

Thailand Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
Author: jakkrapongt
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions
Source: ThaiAddress.org

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country
- [thai-temples-knowledge](https://github.com/jakkrapongt/thai-temples-knowledge) — Thai temple addresses
- [open-admin-data](https://github.com/open-admin-data) — Open admin data for ASEAN
